records.ety: [L. abducere to lead away; ab + ducere to lead. See Duke, and cf. Abduct.]
records.morph: [imp. & p. p. Abduced (<?/); p. pr. & vb. n. Abducing.]

defs: To draw or conduct away; to withdraw; to draw to a different part.
quotes: If we abduce the eye unto either corner, the object will not duplicate.
